cards.title: The Pet That Taught Us to Raise a Family
cards.body: A family discovers that caring for a rabbit requires as much patience and nurturing as raising children. The experience reveals unexpected lessons about attentive parenting.

cards.title: Parental Advice That Lasts a Lifetime
cards.body: A daughter reflects on her father's deathbed wisdom and how it continues to guide her life decisions. His guidance remains a touchstone for how she raises her own family.

cards.title: Keeping Wife's Books Safe for Our Son
cards.body: A widowed father finds healing by preserving his late wife's book collection for their son. Reading together helps him process grief while nurturing their bond.

cards.title: Supporting Teenagers Through A-Levels
cards.body: Parents of A-level students often feel helpless watching their teens navigate intense academic pressure. Understanding the limits of parental support during this phase is crucial.

cards.title: Five Ways to Support Your Teen
cards.body: A compassionate guide helps parents strengthen connection, trust, and emotional balance with adolescents. The Five B's framework supports healthy independence during the teenage years.

cards.title: What Makes a Child Feel Like They Matter
cards.body: Parents can help children feel valued by paying close attention to their emotions in the first three years of life. Consistent soothing and emotional regulation support lasting self-worth.

cards.title: Social Media as Bad for Young People as Smoking
cards.body: The Academy of Medical Royal Colleges warns that social media poses serious health risks to young people. Doctors should routinely assess screen time during pediatric visits.

cards.title: Hair Tests and Family Court Custody Cases
cards.body: Growing concerns surround how hair strand tests are being interpreted in family court proceedings. Some parents fear losing custody based on flawed testing methods.
